channel.title: Vizitor Help Centre | Get Started & Learn Features on World #NO. 1 Visitor Management System | Check-in Software | Vizitor
channel.description: Recent content in Vizitor Help Centre | Get Started & Learn Features on World #NO. 1 Visitor Management System | Check-in Software | Vizitor

item.title: How easy is it to get set up ?
item.description:
Creating a Vizitor account is a simple and straightforward process that can be completed in just a few steps. Vizitor is a visitor management system that helps businesses efficiently manage their visitors, making the check-in and check-out process seamless. Here’s a step-by-step guide on how to create a Vizitor account as a man

Step 1: Visit the Vizitor dashboard.

Step 2: Sign Up

Once you’re on the Vizitor website, locate the “Sign Up” or “Get Started” button. Click on it to begin the registration process.

item.title: How to change language of Vizitor app ?
item.description:
Vizitor is available in almost every language and changing a language is very easy with Vizitor.

Step 1: Open the Vizitor mobile app on your mobile phone.

Step 2: When you open the Vizitor app, you will be greeted with a screen prompting you to pair your device.

Note: This simple and straightforward process allows you to establish a connection between your device and the Vizitor app, ensuring seamless functionality and access to all the features. Start by following the on-screen instructions to successfully pair your device and unlock the full potential of Vizitor’s visitor management capabilities.

item.title: How to pair a device with vizitor?
item.description:
Step 1: Login to your Vizitor dashboard.

Step 2: Go to settings and navigate to devices.

Step 3: Click on the devices tab from the left menu.

Step 4: Click on click here then use the pairing code in the visitor app.

Step 5: Now open your mobile vizitor app.

Step 6: Long press on top vizitor icon.

Step 7: Then, you have to enter generated code into this field.

item.title: How to add an employee pass app to the vizitor dashboard?
item.description:
Introduction:

Adding the Employee Pass app to your visitor dashboard can improve your organisation’s visitor management process and further streamline access control for your employees.

Step 1: Open Pass App, fill the sign up form and set Employee Pass App credentials.

Step 2 : If the sign up is successful, you will receive an otp mail confirming the integration.

Step 3: To complete the integration, you will need to provide the required credentials for the Employee Pass App. Login by generating a password. This includes an API key or is required to link the two platforms.

item.title: How To Add Location To Vizitor ?
item.description:
Adding a location to Vizitor is very simple. You can add as many locations you want to add but, that depends on the plan you have subscribed for. You can get a detailed understanding of how many locations are covered in each plan on our pricing page.

To set up a new location in Vizitor, follow these simple steps:

Step 1 : Access your Vizitor dashboard: Log in to your Vizitor account using your credentials. If you don’t have an account yet, you can sign up for one.

item.title: How To Add Your Business Logo To Vizitor ?
item.description:
Having a personalised front desk is one of the most important features for any business. Vizitor not only helps you in securing and streamlining your business but also helps you in giving a unique identity to your front desk as well.

Step 1: Log into your Vizitor Dashboard.

Step 2: Go to the settings tab from the top panel.

Step 3: Click on the branding tab from the left menu.

item.title: How to Customize Form ?
item.description:
A front desk/reception is one of the most important places for any business. As it gives out the first impression of your business to prospective clients and visitors. Having a digitally customised form will not only help you with streamlining the visitor data but will also help with shortening the waiting time.

Step 1: Login to your Vizitor dashboard.

Step 2: Click on the settings tab from the top panel.

item.title: How to pre-register visitors/employees ?
item.description:
Step 1: Login to your Vizitor dashboard.

Step 2: Click on the Invites tab from the left panel.

Note: This feature enables you to efficiently handle all aspects of visitor invitations, ensuring a smooth and organised process. Stay in control and simplify your visitor management with Vizitor’s intuitive Invites tab.

Step 3: Once you are in the Invitees screen, click on Pre Appointment. The Pre Appointment URL will be copied.

item.title: How to send invite to a visitor ?
item.description:
Step 1: Login to your Vizitor dashboard.

Step 2: Click on the Invites tab from the left panel.

Step 3: Click on the send invite button. After clicking a pop up form will open asking to input the mobile number of visitors you want to invite.

Step 4: Once you fill out all the details just click on send and the invitation will be on its way to your visitor and the entry will start appearing in dashboard.

item.title: How to send invites in bulk ?
item.description:
Step 1: Login to your Vizitor dashboard.

Step 2: Click on the Invites tab from the left panel.

Step 3: Once you click on the bulk invite an import wizard will open. Asking you to upload a csv file. You’ll need to make sure that the file matches the syntex.

Once you initiate the process of sending bulk invites in Vizitor, you can take advantage of the convenient import wizard. By clicking on the “Bulk Invite” option, an import wizard will be launched, prompting you to upload a CSV file containing the necessary visitor information. It is crucial to ensure that the CSV file adheres to the specified syntax to ensure successful import. This typically involves organising the data in columns such as name, email address, phone number, purpose, and other relevant details.

item.title: How to add a new employee
item.description:
Employees are very crucial for every business and providing them easy accessibility to premises is even more crucial. Vizitor allows you to add your employees manually and adding them in Vizitor is very easy.

Step 1: Login to your Vizitor dashboard.

Step 2: Click on the Employee tab from the top panel.

Step 3: Firstly Click the department button on the top bar and create the department for Employee.

item.title: Step-by-Step Guide: How to Do Web Check-In with Vizitor
item.description: A front desk or reception is the most crucial and important area for any business. As the saying goes ” First Impression Is The Last Impression”. The first impression of your reception can dramatically change the behaviour of any user, If your reception is hitech and has already adapted a visitor management solution, your guests will be amazed by how much the process is streamlined and Vizitor not only let them check-in with their own mobile devices but also let them check-in by using the web check-in feature.

item.title: How to check visitor log ?
item.description:
For businesses who receive 100s of guests daily, keeping a track of all the visitor logs can be very difficult if you are still using a paper base visitor log. However, if you are using a digital visitor management system keeping a track of your visitor can become very simple and you can even track the back dated visitor logs as well.

Step 1: Login to your Vizitor dashboard.

Step 2: Click on the Visitor Log tab from the left panel.

item.title: How To Enable Badge Printing ?
item.description:
In Vizitor, managing badge printing options for visitor check-ins is a breeze. Follow these steps to enable or disable badge printing:

If you are a business that receives 100s of guests or visitors daily then keeping a track of them can be more easy by using a Visitor management system. You can put an extra layer of verification by printing the badges for people who check-in to your premises.

Step 1: Access your Vizitor dashboard: Log in to your Vizitor account using your credentials.

item.title: How To check-in With Vizitorapp ?
item.description:
It’s very easy to check-in with Vizitor App, especially if you have an Android Tablet or iPad available with you along with an Email address and a phone number to authorise your account.

When a visitor signs in, Vizitor generates a visitor entry that serves as a comprehensive record of their visit. This entry includes the visitor’s information, such as sign-in and out times, their photo, signed legal documents, and more. The dashboard displays these entries in real time as visitors sign in, and you can access all the details by simply clicking on the visitor’s name.

item.title: How To Enable Photo Capturing ?
item.description:
Having a digital visitor management system present at your front desk / reception is a blessing and having a photo capturing feature provides an extra layer of security to your organisation.

Step 1: Login to your Vizitor dashboard.

Step 2: Click on the settings tab from the top panel.

Step 3: Click on the configuration tab from the left panel.

Step 4: Click on the App setting tab from Left.

item.title: How to manage app settings ?
item.description:
Having a digital visitor management system present at your front desk / reception is a blessing and having a photo capturing feature provides an extra layer of security to your organisation.

Step 1: Login to your Vizitor dashboard.

Step 2: Click on the settings tab from the top.

Step 3: Click on the configuration from the left panel.

Note: Configuration section provides you with a range of options to fine-tune and personalise your visitor management system according to your specific requirements. Within the Configuration settings, you can:

item.title: How to pair a device with code?
item.description:
Step 1: Login to your Vizitor dashboard.

Step 2: Go to settings and navigate to devices.

Step 3: Click on the devices tab from the left menu.

Step 4: Click on click here then use the pairing code in the visitor app.

Step 5: Now open your mobile vizitor app.

Step 6: Long press on top vizitor icon.

Step 7: Then, you have to enter generated code into this field.

item.title: How to Enable Healthcare Questionnaire In Vizitor ?
item.description:
In today’s time a health care questionnaire is a must have for your business. This not only helps you keep your employees and guests safe from any virus threat but also gives your guests extra comfort about your security measures.

Step 1: Login to your Visitor dashboard.

Step 2: Click on the settings tab from the top panel.

Step 3: Click on the configuration tab from the left menu.

Step 4: Click the Covid-19 Questionnaire tab from the top menu.

item.title: How to refer a friend ?
item.description:
Step 1: Login to your Vizitor dashboard.

Step 2: Click on the FAQs tab from the top panel.

Step 3: Click on Refer a Friend tab from the left panel.

Step 4: Once you are in the refer a friend section you can either invite your friend by typing their email address and clicking on the invite button or you share a personalized URL directly to them via a SMS or Email.
